page.shift_pad1: action_deck 1 ? deck 3 effect_active "KeyLoopUp" : action_deck 2 ? deck 4 effect_active "KeyLoopUp" : action_deck 3 ? deck 1 effect_active "KeyLoopUp" : action_deck 4 ? deck 2 effect_active "KeyLoopUp" : nothing
page.shift_pad5: action_deck 1 ? deck 3 effect_active "KeyLoopDown" : action_deck 2 ? deck 4 effect_active "KeyLoopDown" : action_deck 3 ? deck 1 effect_active "KeyLoopDown" : action_deck 4 ? deck 2 effect_active "KeyLoopDown" : nothing
page.shift_pad4: action_deck 1 ? toggle "d1ppXL" & var "d1ppXL" ? repeat_start_instant "rsid1ppXL" 33ms & pad_page "CLONELOOP" ? deck 1 level & param_invert & deck 3 level : repeat_stop "rsid1ppXL" : repeat_stop "rsid1ppXL" : action_deck 2 ? toggle "d2ppXL" & var "d2ppXL" ? repeat_start_instant "rsid2ppXL" 33ms & pad_page "CLONELOOP" ? deck 2 level & param_invert & deck 4 level : repeat_stop "rsid2ppXL" : repeat_stop "rsid2ppXL" : action_deck 3 ? toggle "d3ppXL" & var "d3ppXL" ? repeat_start_instant "rsid3ppXL" 33ms & pad_page "CLONELOOP" ? deck 3 level & param_invert & deck 1 level : repeat_stop "rsid3ppXL" : repeat_stop "rsid3ppXL" : action_deck 4 ? toggle "d4ppXL" & var "d4ppXL" ? repeat_start_instant "rsid4ppXL" 33ms & pad_page "CLONELOOP" ? deck 4 level & param_invert & deck 2 level : repeat_stop "rsid4ppXL" : repeat_stop "rsid4ppXL" : nothing
page.param2: action_deck 1 ? deck 1 var "ppEV" 1 ? on & deck 3 effect_active "echo" 0 & deck 3 effect_active "echo" 1 & deck 1 repeat_start_instant "ppd1CE" 50ms & deck 3 play ? deck 3 effect_slider "echo" 1 0.2 : deck 3 effect_slider "echo" 1 0.9 & deck 1 repeat_stop "ppd1CE" : deck 1 repeat_stop "ppd1CE" & deck 3 effect_active "echo" 0 & off : action_deck 2 ? deck 2 var "ppEV" 1 ? on & deck 4 effect_active "echo" 0 & deck 4 effect_active "echo" 1 & deck 2 repeat_start_instant "ppd2CE" 50ms & deck 4 play ? deck 4 effect_slider "echo" 1 0.2 : deck 4 effect_slider "echo" 1 0.9 & deck 2 repeat_stop "ppd2CE" : deck 2 repeat_stop "ppd2CE" & deck 4 effect_active "echo" 0 & off : action_deck 3 ? deck 3 & var "ppEV" 1 ? on & deck 1 effect_active "echo" 0 & deck 1 effect_active "echo" 1 & repeat_start_instant "ppd3CE" 50ms & deck 1 play ? deck 1 effect_slider "echo" 1 0.2 : deck 1 effect_slider "echo" 1 0.9 deck 3 repeat_stop "ppd3CE" : deck 3 repeat_stop "ppd3CE" & deck 1 effect_active "echo" 0 & off : action_deck 4 ? deck 4 var "ppEV" 1 ? on & deck 2 effect_active "echo" 0 & deck 2 effect_active "echo" 1 & deck 4 repeat_start_instant "ppd4CE" 50ms & deck 2 play ? deck 2 effect_slider "echo" 1 0.2 : deck 2 effect_slider "echo" 1 0.9 & deck 4 repeat_stop "ppd4CE" : deck 4 repeat_stop "ppd4CE" & deck 2 effect_active "echo" 0 & off : nothing
page.shift_pad3: action_deck 1 ? deck 1 toggle "ppEV" & var "ppEV" 1 ? on & deck 3 effect_active "echo" 0 & deck 3 effect_active "echo" 1 & deck 1 repeat_start_instant "ppd1CE" 50ms & deck 3 play ? deck 1 set "ppCLdoOnce" 0 & deck 1 var "ppCLdoOnce1" 1 ? nothing : deck 1 set "ppCLdoOnce1" 1 & deck 3 effect_slider "echo" 1 0.2 : deck 1 var "ppCLdoOnce" 1 ? nothing : deck 1 set "ppCLdoOnce" 1 & deck 3 effect_slider "echo" 1 0.9 & deck 1 set "ppCLdoOnce1" 0 : deck 1 repeat_stop "ppd1CE" & deck 3 effect_active "echo" 0 & deck 1 set "ppCLdoOnce1" 0 & off : action_deck 2 ? deck 2 toggle "ppEV" & var "ppEV" 1 ? on & deck 4 effect_active "echo" 0 & deck 4 effect_active "echo" 1 & deck 2 repeat_start_instant "ppd2CE" 50ms & deck 4 play ? deck 2 set "ppCLdoOnce" 0 & deck 2 var "ppCLdoOnce1" 1 ? nothing : deck 2 set "ppCLdoOnce1" 1 & deck 4 effect_slider "echo" 1 0.2 : deck 2 var "ppCLdoOnce" 1 ? nothing : deck 2 set "ppCLdoOnce" 1 & deck 4 effect_slider "echo" 1 0.9 & deck 2 set "ppCLdoOnce1" 0 : deck 2 repeat_stop "ppd2CE" & deck 4 effect_active "echo" 0 & deck 2 set "ppCLdoOnce1" 0 & off : action_deck 3 ? deck 3 toggle "ppEV" & var "ppEV" 1 ? on & deck 1 effect_active "echo" 0 & deck 1 effect_active "echo" 1 & deck 3 repeat_start_instant "ppd3CE" 50ms & deck 1 play ? deck 3 set "ppCLdoOnce" 0 & deck 3 var "ppCLdoOnce1" 1 ? nothing : deck 3 set "ppCLdoOnce1" 1 & deck 1 effect_slider "echo" 1 0.2 : deck 3 var "ppCLdoOnce" 1 ? nothing : deck 3 set "ppCLdoOnce" 1 & deck 1 effect_slider "echo" 1 0.9 & deck 3 set "ppCLdoOnce1" 0 : deck 3 repeat_stop "ppd3CE" & deck 1 effect_active "echo" 0 & deck 3 set "ppCLdoOnce1" 0 & off : action_deck 4 ? deck 4 toggle "ppEV" & var "ppEV" 1 ? on & deck 2 effect_active "echo" 0 & deck 2 effect_active "echo" 1 & deck 4 repeat_start_instant "ppd4CE" 50ms & deck 2 play ? deck 4 set "ppCLdoOnce" 0 & deck 4 var "ppCLdoOnce1" 1 ? nothing : deck 4 set "ppCLdoOnce1" 1 & deck 2 effect_slider "echo" 1 0.2 : deck 4 var "ppCLdoOnce" 1 ? nothing : deck 4 set "ppCLdoOnce" 1 & deck 2 effect_slider "echo" 1 0.9 & deck 4 set "ppCLdoOnce1" 0 : deck 4 repeat_stop "ppd4CE" & deck 2 effect_active "echo" 0 & deck 4 set "ppCLdoOnce1" 0 & off : nothing
